name: core normalization engine and cli flow
summary: Adds the canonical row schema docs, gold dataset fixtures, deterministic alias mapping registry, unit conversion registry, normalization pipeline, and CLI normalize command.
user_visible_flows: operator runs the normalize command on a sample csv
operator receives normalized json and csv output
operator receives a clear error for malformed input headers
system_flows: csv input is parsed into source records
alias mapping resolves unique, ambiguous, and unknown cases
normalization outputs are written to json and csv
notes: No frontend is involved in this slice. Verification should focus on deterministic normalization behavior, cli execution, output correctness, and error-path handling.
